---
title: "Diagram 2: Boox to Mermaid workflow"
date: "2026-03-15"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Diagram 2: Draw a diagram in Boox and turn it into Mermaid Markdown or Quarto

### Example: Calendar sync

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    gc["Google Calendar"]
    wo["Work Outlook"]
    ab["Anon Blocks"]
    sa["Share availability"]

    gc <--> |Pull/Push| ab
    wo --> |Pull/Push| ab
    ab --> sa
```

::: {.callout-caution title="Skill uncertainty notes" collapse="true"}
- Lower arrow from Work Outlook has a second label "Anon blocks" written beside it — likely a repeat label, not a separate node

### Process steps

1. Draw
2. Export manually
3. Agent skill → Markdown + Mermaid
:::
